'''Orooturoo''' was the home of a race of [[Unidentified Orooturoo species|titanic purple-colored sluglike beings]], most notably [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Nampi]]. It was an endpoint of both the [[Metellos Trade Route/Legends|Metellos Trade Route]] and the [[Widek Bypass]].

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]'' {{1stm}}
